title: PLocal Function
parameters:
point	An integer value  or P
						number or P(expr) or point label.

Cautions for compatibility

No variables can be specified for point parameter

To use variables, write

PLocal(P(varName))
description:
PLocal Function

PLocal Function

See_Also Example

Returns the local number for a specified point.
see_also:
PLocal Statement

PLocal Function Example

Integer localNum

localNum = PLocal(pick)
